creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 186632
update devel/py-logbook to upstream version 1.1.0

This patch updates devel/py-logbook to upstream version 1.1.0.  I also changed ``USES=`` to ``USES?=`` so I can create a slave devel/py3-logbook port.  I need this to update devel/py3-threema-msgapi to the latest upstream version.
